name: micro-frontend-platform
description: Future-Ready Micro Frontend Platform POC - Super App Shell + Self-Deployable Micro Apps

scripts.dev:all:ci: pnpm --filter @micro-frontend/customer-app dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 & pnpm --filter @micro-frontend/billing-app dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174 & pnpm --filter @micro-frontend/analytics-app dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5175 & pnpm --filter @micro-frontend/admin-app dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5176 & pnpm --filter @micro-frontend/ai-assistant-app dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5177 & pnpm --filter @micro-frontend/shell dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3001
scripts.podman:build: for service in customer billing analytics admin ai-assistant shell; do podman compose build "$service" || exit 1; done
scripts.podman:logs: podman compose logs -f shell customer billing analytics admin ai-assistant
